notes.en: **This section assumes you have unlocked [[character:qiqi]]'s Lucid Revelation buffs from the Witch's Revelation Quest: Instruction of Curious Form.**

[[character:qiqi]] is capable of providing not only extremely strong healing, but also decent [[element:cryo]] Application and Energy generation. Not only can she now generate energy when the Herald of Frost hits enemies, but now her [[ability:skill]] has near 100% uptime, and performs coordiated attacks off-field.

Additionaly, [[character:qiqi]] is capable of providing potent buffs to the [[element:stellar-conduct]] reaction, so she is an excellent member to pair with [[character:sandrone]] (who is currently the only character capable of enabling the [[element:stellar-conduct]] reaction, and thus creating a Polestar Field).
